    android.dll sdk uninstall --package emulator

    avd

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    android.dll avd [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll avd list
    android.dll avd targets
    android.dll avd devices
    android.dll avd create --name MyEmulator --sdk 
"system-images;android-31;google_apis;x86_64" --device pixel
    android.dll avd delete --name MyEmulator

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list       Lists available AVDs                    
    targets    Lists available targets for AVDs        
    devices    Lists available devices for AVDs        
    create     Creates a new AVD                       
    delete     Deletes an AVD                          
    start      Starts an existing available AVD by name

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Creates a new AVD

USAGE:
    android.dll avd create [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll avd create --name MyEmulator --sdk 
"system-images;android-31;google_apis;x86_64" --device pixel

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help           Prints help information                                
    -h, --home           Android SDK Home/Root Path                             
    -n, --name           Name of the AVD/Emulator                               
    -s, --sdk            SDK Id (Possible values from: `sdk list`)              
    -d, --device         Device Id or NumericId (Possible options from: `avd    
                         devices`)                                              
    -t, --target         Target Id or NumericId (Possible options from: `avd    
                         targets`)                                              
    -p, --path           Path to create the AVD                                 
        --sdcard-path    Path to create the SDCard                              
        --sdcard-size    Size of SDCard to create in MB                         
    -a, --abi            The ABI to use for the AVD (Auto-selects if there is   
                         only one ABI)                                          
        --skin           The name of a skin to use with this device             
    -f, --force          Force the creation of the AVD

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Creates a new AVD

USAGE:
    android.dll avd create [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll avd create --name MyEmulator --sdk 
"system-images;android-31;google_apis;x86_64" --device pixel

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help           Prints help information                                
    -h, --home           Android SDK Home/Root Path                             
    -n, --name           Name of the AVD/Emulator                               
    -s, --sdk            SDK Id (Possible values from: `sdk list`)              
    -d, --device         Device Id or NumericId (Possible options from: `avd    
                         devices`)                                              
    -t, --target         Target Id or NumericId (Possible options from: `avd    
                         targets`)                                              
    -p, --path           Path to create the AVD                                 
        --sdcard-path    Path to create the SDCard                              
        --sdcard-size    Size of SDCard to create in MB                         
    -a, --abi            The ABI to use for the AVD (Auto-selects if there is   
                         only one ABI)                                          
        --skin           The name of a skin to use with this device             
    -f, --force          Force the creation of the AVD

    android.dll avd delete [OPTIONS]

    -n, --name     Name of the AVD/Emulator

        --force    Stop the running emulator (if any) before deleting and       
                   suppress all errors (cleanup mode)

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Starts an existing available AVD by name

USAGE:
    android.dll avd start [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll avd start --name MyEmulator
    android.dll avd start --name MyEmulator --wait-boot
    android.dll avd start --name MyEmulator --wait-boot --no-snapshot

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                  Prints help information                         
    -n, --name                  Name of the AVD/Emulator                        
    -w, --wait                  Wait for emulator to boot                       
        --wait-exit             Wait for emulator process to exit               
    -t, --timeout               Timeout in seconds if waiting for emulator to   
                                boot                                            
        --wipe                  Wipe data                                       
    -h, --home                  Android SDK home/root path                      
        --no-snapshot           Disable Snapshot load/save                      
        --no-snapshot-load      Disable Snapshot load                           
        --no-snapshot-save      Disable Snapshot save                           
        --camera-back           Emulation mode for a camera facing backwards    
                                (Possible values: emulated, webcam#, none)      
        --camera-front          Emulation mode for a camera facing forward      
                                (Possible values: emulated, webcam#, none)      
    -p, --port                  The TCP port number for the console and adb     
                                (Possible values: ranges from 5554 to 5682)     
        --memory                The physical RAM size in MB (Possible values:   
                                ranges from 1536 to 8192)                       
        --cores                 The number of virtual CPU cores (overrides the  
                                emulator default)                               
        --partition-size        The system/data partition size in MB            
        --cache-size            The cache partition size in MB (Default is 66   
                                MB)                                             
        --screen                Emulated touch screen mode (Possible values:    
                                touch, multi-touch, no-touch)                   
        --engine                Emulator engine (Possible values: auto, classic,
                                qemu2)                                          
        --accel                 Acceleration mode (Possible values: auto, off,  
                                on)                                             
        --no-boot-anim          Disable boot animation during emulator startup  
                                for faster booting                              
        --no-window             Disable graphical window display                
        --no-audio              Disable audio support                           
        --gpu                   GPU emulation mode                              
        --no-jni                Disable extended Java Native Interface (JNI)    
                                checks                                          
    -v, --verbose               Print emulator initialization messages          
        --grpc                  gRPC port number                                
        --grpc-use-jwt          Use JWT with gRPC                               
        --no-animations         Disable all window, transition, and animator    
                                animation scales on the emulator (persists for  
                                this AVD until changed)                         
        --cpu-threshold         Wait for guest CPU load average to drop below   
                                this threshold before proceeding                
        --response-threshold    Maximum response time in seconds for device     
                                stability probes (waits for 3 consecutive       
                                responses under this threshold before           
                                proceeding)

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Starts an existing available AVD by name

USAGE:
    android.dll avd start [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll avd start --name MyEmulator
    android.dll avd start --name MyEmulator --wait-boot
    android.dll avd start --name MyEmulator --wait-boot --no-snapshot

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                  Prints help information                         
    -n, --name                  Name of the AVD/Emulator                        
    -w, --wait                  Wait for emulator to boot                       
        --wait-exit             Wait for emulator process to exit               
    -t, --timeout               Timeout in seconds if waiting for emulator to   
                                boot                                            
        --wipe                  Wipe data                                       
    -h, --home                  Android SDK home/root path                      
        --no-snapshot           Disable Snapshot load/save                      
        --no-snapshot-load      Disable Snapshot load                           
        --no-snapshot-save      Disable Snapshot save                           
        --camera-back           Emulation mode for a camera facing backwards    
                                (Possible values: emulated, webcam#, none)      
        --camera-front          Emulation mode for a camera facing forward      
                                (Possible values: emulated, webcam#, none)      
    -p, --port                  The TCP port number for the console and adb     
                                (Possible values: ranges from 5554 to 5682)     
        --memory                The physical RAM size in MB (Possible values:   
                                ranges from 1536 to 8192)                       
        --cores                 The number of virtual CPU cores (overrides the  
                                emulator default)                               
        --partition-size        The system/data partition size in MB            
        --cache-size            The cache partition size in MB (Default is 66   
                                MB)                                             
        --screen                Emulated touch screen mode (Possible values:

        --engine                Emulator engine (Possible values: auto, classic,
                                qemu2)                                          
        --accel                 Acceleration mode (Possible values: auto, off,

        --no-boot-anim          Disable boot animation during emulator startup

        --no-window             Disable graphical window display

    -v, --verbose               Print emulator initialization messages

        --no-animations         Disable all window, transition, and animator

        --cpu-threshold         Wait for guest CPU load average to drop below   
                                this threshold before proceeding

                                stability probes (waits for 3 consecutive       
                                responses under this threshold before           
                                proceeding)

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    android.dll device [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll device list
    android.dll device info --property ro.product.system.model
    android.dll device info --property "ro\.vendor\..*"
    android.dll device info --device 172.22.100.90
    android.dll device info --device emulator.*

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list         Lists available devices / emulators           
    info         Lists device properties                       
    packages     Lists installed packages on a device          
    install      Installs a package                            
    uninstall    Uninstalls a package                          
    launch       Launches an app on a device                   
    logcat       Dumps logcat from a running emulator or device

    android.dll device info --device 172.22.100.90
    android.dll device info --device emulator.*

COMMANDS:

    info         Lists device properties                       
    packages     Lists installed packages on a device          
    install      Installs a package                            
    uninstall    Uninstalls a package                          
    launch       Launches an app on a device                   
    logcat       Dumps logcat from a running emulator or device

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Launches an app on a device

USAGE:
    android.dll device launch [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll device launch --package com.example.App
    android.dll device launch --package com.example.App --activity .MainActivity

OPTIONS:
                      DEFAULT                                                   
    -h, --help                   Prints help information                        
    -f, --format      None       Output Format                                  
    -h, --home                   Android SDK Home/Root Path                     
    -d, --id                     Serial or Device to filter for                 
    -p, --pkg                    Package name to launch (e.g.,                  
                                 com.companyname.myapp)                         
    -a, --activity               Activity name to launch (optional - uses       
                                 default launcher activity if not specified)    
    -w, --wait        True       Wait for the activity to finish launching

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    android.dll jdk [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll jdk list
    android.dll jdk find
    android.dll jdk find --version 17
    android.dll jdk dotnet-prefer --home /path/to/jdk

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list             Searches for and lists JDK locations                       
    find             Searches for and returns the JAVA_HOME path to best        
                     matching JDK                                               
    dotnet-prefer    Sets the DotNet (.NET) preferred JDK location

OPTIONS:

COMMANDS:
    list             Searches for and lists JDK locations                       
    find             Searches for and returns the JAVA_HOME path to best        
                     matching JDK                                               
    dotnet-prefer    Sets the DotNet (.NET) preferred JDK location

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Sets the DotNet (.NET) preferred JDK location

USAGE:
    android.dll jdk dotnet-prefer [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    android.dll sdk [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll sdk list
    android.dll sdk list --available
    android.dll sdk list --installed
    android.dll sdk install --package emulator
    android.dll sdk uninstall --package emulator

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list               Lists Android SDK packages                               
    install            Installs and/or Updates the specified Android SDK        
                       package(s)                                               
    uninstall          Uninstalls the specified Android SDK package(s)          
    download           Downloads a new copy of the Android SDK cmdline-tools    
    info               Android SDK Info                                         
    dotnet-prefer      Sets the DotNet (.NET) preferred SDK location            
    find               Searches for and returns the ANDROID_HOME path to best   
                       matching Android SDK                                     
    licenses           Lists Android SDK licenses                               
    accept-licenses    Accepts Android SDK licenses

                       matching Android SDK                                     
    licenses           Lists Android SDK licenses                               
    accept-licenses    Accepts Android SDK licenses

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Accepts Android SDK licenses

USAGE:
    android.dll sdk accept-licenses [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll sdk accept-licenses
    android.dll sdk accept-licenses --force

OPTIONS:
                    DEFAULT                                                     
    -h, --help                 Prints help information                          
    -f, --format    None       Output Format                                    
    -h, --home                 Android SDK Home/Root Path                       
        --force                Force license accept without display license text
                               or requiring any user interaction

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Downloads a new copy of the Android SDK cmdline-tools

USAGE:
    android.dll sdk download [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    android.dll sdk download --home /path/to/sdk
    android.dll sdk download --home /path/to/sdk --force

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information                                    
    -h, --home       Android SDK Home/Root Path                                 
    -f, --force      Forces re-download of cmdline-tools even if already        
                     installed                                                  
        --preview    Allow preview versions to be downloaded                    
        --version    Optional version to download                               
        --arch       Optional specific architecture (current host arch is       
                     default)                                                   
        --os         Optional specific OS (current host OS is default)

    android.dll sdk list --available
    android.dll sdk list --installed

        --available               Show available packages to install
        --all                     Show all packages                 
        --installed               Show available packages to install
    -f, --format       None       Output Format                     
    -h, --home                    Android SDK Home/Root Path
